calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Off Calendar

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Continued To Mar-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jai Dadlani for and with Sandra Bazan.

Ms. Bazan explained that she determined time of birth based on what her Mother told her, that the Father's name came up when the Social Security Administration entered her social security number, that she has never met her Father, provided an orgiginal letter from Social Security and stated that this matter came up because her Employer could not find a birth record. In addition, Ms. Bazan explained that she could either quit her job, take 8-days to figure what she needs to do, that the hospital does not have records prior to 1990 and that her Employer stated that Social Security needs to confirm her birth. Mr. Dadlani requested 60-days to try and obtain affidavits of birth from the Grandfather and Father. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth was continued to March 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further evidence to support the petition.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.
